case_title: JAMES FOLAN VS. KUK-JI JO LEE ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-07-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, KUK-JI JO
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, KUK-JI JO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-20-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DAVID LEE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-20-2016 AT 8:30 AM.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED TO DEFENDANT DAVID LEE RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FOLAN, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, KUK-JI JO LEE, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT KUK-JI JO LEE PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DAVID LEE. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES DAVID LEE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. IFP WAIVER GRANTED; NO COSTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOLAN, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, KUK-JI JO $3,125.31 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,125.31, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2465.31, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
